attestation: Issuer attests that Note DEF is fully backed by native CSPR held in the named reserve wallet on Casper, as of 2026-06-21. Liabilities are 2000 CSPR; reserves are 2682 CSPR, a comfortable surplus in the same asset. Custody is held with BitGo, a recognized and reputable digital-asset custodian. The published attestation document is referenced by URL with its SHA-256 digest for integrity verification.
note: Honest, well-backed claim. All four facets can fetch their own truth: solvency reads the on-chain reserve, valuation reads the live price, custodian resolves BitGo in a public knowledge source, authenticity fetches the referenced document and verifies its SHA-256 matches. Should PASS to Backed.
